body: The 16-step trance gate chops a sustained pad into rhythmic pulses locked to tempo, the classic instant-movement trick for trance chords. The built-in arpeggiator turns held notes into melodic patterns, so a single chord can drive a whole section.
Four-voice unison with stereo spread and detune thickens leads and supersaws; built-in delay, chorus and reverb finish the sound inside the plugin.
